_meta.note: Phase 2: parameter-filled library. Each motion has concrete values for animation parameters so motion_target direct-write produces visible, emotion-specific behavior. Scale is 'normal' intensity; _light/_heavy variants are future work. Applicable to both TachieItem (speaker) and ImageItem/GroupItem (skit performers) — not restricted by item type. v3: base_prop_oneshot schema added for enter_from_left / deny_oneshot / surprise_oneshot. One-shot motions override segment base X/Y via anchor+delta, suspending camera pan during the reaction beat (intentional).

enter_from_left.description: 左から横方向に接近し、最後にだけ軽く沈んで「着地して止まる」2段を読ませる one-shot（移動中は縦ズレなし）

deny_oneshot.description: 左右方向のみで大きく首振り否定し anchor に戻す one-shot（縦・傾きなしで平行移動と差別化）

surprise_oneshot.description: 縦方向のみで大きく一度跳ねて戻す驚き one-shot（Zoom/Rotation なしで斜め成分を排除）
